subject: RE: CloudStack API Integration Timeline - Q2 2026 Confirmation
body:
Hi Vendor Relations Team,

Thank you for the follow-up on the CloudStack API integration inquiry.

I can confirm that we are targeting Q2 2026 (April–June 2026) for integration completion. This timeline aligns with our current development roadmap and resource allocation.

To move forward with the integration development, we will need CloudStack to provide sandbox credentials for our technical team. Please request the following from them:

• Sandbox API endpoint URL
• API key and secret key for test account access
• Any relevant documentation on their sandbox environment setup

Once we receive these credentials, our engineering team can begin the integration work.

Please follow up with CloudStack on the credential request at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Internal Communications
